ip_outcome_note: Card name is 'Siebold'; depicted figure (single figure in white chef/formal attire with blue accents, open field) matches the canonical Kalos Elite Four Water-type specialist who is also a renowned chef. Verified via card name, Bulbapedia, and Serebii character entries.

trivia_bullets.text: Siebold is one of the four Elite Four members of the Kalos Pokemon League in Pokemon X and Y (Gen 6, 2013), specializing in Water-type Pokemon. His fellow Elite Four members are Malva (Fire), Wikstrom (Steel), and Drasna (Dragon). Malva was later revealed to be a Team Flare operative, a notable story beat in the X/Y narrative. [Bulbapedia: Siebold; TV Tropes: Pokemon X and Y characters; via WebSearch]

Beyond the Elite Four, Siebold operates a high-end restaurant in Lumiose City. He views battling as a culinary art form — treating each fight as a chef treating cuisine — and is described as solitary, standoffish, and deeply contemplative. [Serebii.net: Siebold anime profile; Bulbapedia: Siebold; via WebSearch]

The Chilling Reign Siebold card (153/198) is a Rapid Strike Supporter that heals 60 damage from up to 2 Rapid Strike Pokemon. Community assessment found the 60-HP heal underwhelming for the competitive meta of its Standard period, where Pokemon hit for much higher damage thresholds. Full Art version (198/198) and Rainbow Rare (221/198) also exist in the set. [WebSearch snippet via TCGPlayer; TCGCollector]

Chilling Reign (SWSH6) was released June 18, 2021 as a Sword & Shield era expansion; it introduced the Rapid Strike and Single Strike battle-style mechanics as its signature mechanical identity. Siebold's Rapid Strike tag is consistent with his Water-type identity — many Water-type Rapid Strike support pieces appeared in this set and its companion expansion Battle Styles. [WebSearch snippet via JustinBasil.com]
